prompt: A fantastical watercolor-style illustration. A cute boy with curly hair is standing on a warm European street corner. He is wearing an oversized pastel green knit sweater, loose beige shorts, and holding a coffee cup and a bouquet of wildflowers. His slightly messy ginger-colored hair is adorned with small flowers. Fairy lights glow gently overhead with soft cinematic bokeh. A dreamlike autumn atmosphere. The background features fine details of a flower shop. Large, adorable eyes and slightly rosy cheeks. Hand-drawn sketch-style lines with watercolor bleeds. Warm, natural lighting. Ultra-high-definition picture-book art style. Soft pastel colors. A charming and magical atmosphere.
